{{Quote|As an Imperial bounty hunter of no small reputation, you have come to my attention by way of recommendation of Sener in the ISB.|An Imperial governor to the bounty hunter Rill|<ref name="SQ" />}}
'''Rill''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who often worked for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. On the recommendation of [[Sener]] of the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]], Rill was hired by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] to capture the leader of an underground [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] network in an Imperial controlled city. The governor was aware that the target, [[Tamaron Rill]], was the bounty hunter's own father. She accepted the assignment.

==Appearances==
